preview_text: "You see, we travel the starry skies. We pass by this area every one hundred years, but we suddenly stopped in front of this planet. A strange force had latched onto our ship, pulling away Star Bits, and our power source, Power Stars. Our ship had lost power, so it entered a deep hibernation state in which it could not move. Those who took your special one also took the Power Stars... And discovered the power to cross the universe."
